features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Tempest Grey

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

performance_options: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$0 50% more power, 68% more range

all.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Stealth M24 Motor: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Battery: An integrated & removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 85 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.
all.New: Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
all.Rear Rack: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!
all.Co-Pilot Capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***
all.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
all.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
all.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
all.Suspension Fork: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
all.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
all.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
all.Easy Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.
all.Fully Redesigned Frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.
all.Motor Controller: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.
all.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: An integrated & removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 85 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.

features.name: New: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!

features.name: Co-Pilot Capable
features.detail: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Suspension Fork
features.detail: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.

features.name: Fully Redesigned Frame
features.detail: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Tempest Grey

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 60 lbs.

all.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Motor Controller: A 24 amp controller swiftly distributes power to the motor and is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.
all.Motor: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Semi-Integrated Battery: A removable 48V, 15Ah (720Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.
all.Fat Tires: Puncture-resistant 26” x 4” knobby tires can handle any terrain with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
all.Suspension Front Fork: Adjustable RST Renegade suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride.
all.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with a 203mm front rotor and a 180mm rear rotor (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Lectric PWR+™: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
all.PAS Torque Sensor: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 26-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: The XPeak's KMC Z8.1 steel chain is equipped with anti rust protection and offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.
all.LCD Display: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 6-8 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.eMTB Safety Tested: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPeak through the rigorous eMTB safety standard testing process to prove the frame, fork, stem, and handlebars can handle off-road conditions ride after ride. The XPeak is rated to ISO 4210-10 eMTB.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: The XPeak frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easily mountable Step-Thru.
all.Weight: With the battery removed, the XPeak 2.0 is just 64.5 lbs. The battery weighs 10.5 lbs.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: A 24 amp controller swiftly distributes power to the motor and is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Semi-Integrated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 15Ah (720Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Fat Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 26” x 4” knobby tires can handle any terrain with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: Adjustable RST Renegade suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with a 203mm front rotor and a 180mm rear rotor (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 26-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: The XPeak's KMC Z8.1 steel chain is equipped with anti rust protection and offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 6-8 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: eMTB Safety Tested
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPeak through the rigorous eMTB safety standard testing process to prove the frame, fork, stem, and handlebars can handle off-road conditions ride after ride. The XPeak is rated to ISO 4210-10 eMTB.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPeak frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easily mountable Step-Thru.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: Weight
features.detail: With the battery removed, the XPeak 2.0 is just 64.5 lbs. The battery weighs 10.5 lbs.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: A 24 amp controller swiftly distributes power to the motor and is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Semi-Integrated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 15Ah (720Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Fat Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 26” x 4” knobby tires can handle any terrain with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: Adjustable RST Renegade suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with a 203mm front rotor and a 180mm rear rotor (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 26-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: The XPeak's KMC Z8.1 steel chain is equipped with anti rust protection and offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 6-8 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: eMTB Safety Tested
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPeak through the rigorous eMTB safety standard testing process to prove the frame, fork, stem, and handlebars can handle off-road conditions ride after ride. The XPeak is rated to ISO 4210-10 eMTB.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPeak frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easily mountable Step-Thru.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: Weight
features.detail: With the battery removed, the XPeak 2.0 is just 64.5 lbs. The battery weighs 10.5 lbs.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 60 lbs.

free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

all.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: A 24 amp controller swiftly distributes power to the motor and is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Semi-Integrated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 20Ah (960Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Fat Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 26” x 4” knobby tires can handle any terrain with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: Adjustable RST Renegade suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with a 203mm front rotor and a 180mm rear rotor (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 26-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: The XPeak's KMC Z8.1 steel chain is equipped with anti rust protection and offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 8-10 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: eMTB Safety Tested
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPeak through the rigorous eMTB safety standard testing process to prove the frame, fork, stem, and handlebars can handle off-road conditions ride after ride. The XPeak is rated to ISO 4210-10 eMTB.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPeak frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easily mountable Step-Thru.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: Weight
features.detail: With the battery removed, the XPeak 2.0 is just 64.5 lbs. The battery weighs 10.5 lbs.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Semi-Integrated Battery: A removable 48V, 20Ah (960Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.
all.Fat Tires: Puncture-resistant 26” x 4” knobby tires can handle any terrain with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
all.Suspension Front Fork: Adjustable RST Renegade suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride.
all.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with a 203mm front rotor and a 180mm rear rotor (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Lectric PWR+™: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
all.PAS Torque Sensor: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 26-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: The XPeak's KMC Z8.1 steel chain is equipped with anti rust protection and offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.
all.LCD Display: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 8-10 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.eMTB Safety Tested: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPeak through the rigorous eMTB safety standard testing process to prove the frame, fork, stem, and handlebars can handle off-road conditions ride after ride. The XPeak is rated to ISO 4210-10 eMTB.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: The XPeak frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easily mountable Step-Thru.
all.Weight: With the battery removed, the XPeak 2.0 is just 64.5 lbs. The battery weighs 10.5 lbs.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.Assemble In Less Than Five Minutes: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPeak is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPeak's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 450 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 300 lbs.

all.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and a throttle delivers the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.*
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Motor: A 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before.
all.Motor Controller: 24 amp externally mounted controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.
all.Battery: A removable 48V, 13Ah (624Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.** The XPedition is also certified to UL 2849.†
all.Smart-Draining Technology: A dual-battery system coupled with a battery isolator will drain 2 batteries at the same time allowing you to stay at higher voltage longer & reach up to 170 miles, respectively.** The bike will arrive with a terminal cover on the second battery mount but can be quickly removed to add a second battery at any time.
all.Rear Rack: A long rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 300lbs and features a specially designed bar for mounting various accessory combinations. The rear rack also has 2 bulit-in mounting windows to easily install childrens seats & more.
all.Suspension Front Fork: The Courier 50 is a custom dual-spring suspension fork with up to 50mm of travel that provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Independent pre-load adjustments in each fork leg allow you to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
all.LCD Display: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Tires: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” street tires make for a smoother ride with ease of control at hand. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires- at no additional cost.
all.Lectric PWR+™: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
all.PAS Torque Sensor: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain paired with an idler pulley offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.
all.Brakes: Ultimate stopping power with hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.2mm thick) offers peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby by indicating which direction you are headed with our new turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the display control pad to trigger a blinking cadence on one side of the rear light.
all.Folding Dual-Leg Kickstand: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.
all.Fenders: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Dual Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.
all.Folding Capabilities: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.
all.Charging: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery.The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.
all.Frame: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!
all.DIN Tested & Rated: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.detail: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.

features.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Dual Seat Post

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!

features.detail: 24 amp externally mounted controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 13Ah (624Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.** The XPedition is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Smart-Draining Technology
features.detail: A dual-battery system coupled with a battery isolator will drain 2 batteries at the same time allowing you to stay at higher voltage longer & reach up to 170 miles, respectively.** The bike will arrive with a terminal cover on the second battery mount but can be quickly removed to add a second battery at any time.

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A long rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 300lbs and features a specially designed bar for mounting various accessory combinations. The rear rack also has 2 bulit-in mounting windows to easily install childrens seats & more.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The Courier 50 is a custom dual-spring suspension fork with up to 50mm of travel that provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Independent pre-load adjustments in each fork leg allow you to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-C port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Tires
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” street tires make for a smoother ride with ease of control at hand. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires- at no additional cost.

features.name: Lectric PWR+™
features.detail: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.

features.name: PAS Torque Sensor
features.detail: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain paired with an idler pulley offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Ultimate stopping power with hydraulic mineral oil brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.2mm thick) offers peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby by indicating which direction you are headed with our new turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the display control pad to trigger a blinking cadence on one side of the rear light.

features.name: Folding Dual-Leg Kickstand
features.detail: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Dual Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.

features.name: Folding Capabilities
features.detail: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery.The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!

features.name: DIN Tested & Rated
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 450 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 300 lbs.

features.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Dual Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.

features.name: Folding Capabilities
features.detail: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight 65lbs without batteries installed. Each XPedition battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging per battery but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPedition 2.0 frame is hydroformed to maximize strength to weight ratio. The lightweight and sturdy 6000 series aluminum features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various tool-free accessory combinations!

features.name: DIN Tested & Rated
features.detail: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Stratus White

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric XPedition 2.0 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPedition's lithium-ion batteries are certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 450 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 300 lbs.

free_accessories.name: Rear Rack
free_accessories.detail: A long rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 300lbs and features a specially designed bar for mounting various accessory combinations. The rear rack also has 2 bulit-in mounting windows to easily install childrens seats & more.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

free_accessories.name: Fenders
free_accessories.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

features.name: Thumb Throttle

features.name: Motor

features.name: Smart-Draining Technology
features.detail: A dual-battery system coupled with a battery isolator will drain 2 batteries at the same time allowing you to stay at higher voltage longer & reach up to 170 miles, respectively.**

Independent pre-load adjustments in each fork leg allow you to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

free_accessories.name: Rear Rack
free_accessories.detail: A long rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 300lbs and features a specially designed bar for mounting various accessory combinations. The rear rack also has 2 bulit-in mounting windows to easily install childrens seats & more.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

free_accessories.name: Fenders
free_accessories.detail: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

all.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and an ergonomic thumb throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle designed for your thumb is easily engaged while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Motor Controller: A 20 amp controller swiftly distributes power to the motor.
all.Motor: A 500W rear hub-motor (1092W Peak) with 55Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Semi-Integrated Battery: A removable 48V, 10.4Ah (500 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPress is also certified to UL 2849.
all.City Tires: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
all.Suspension Front Fork: A custom adjustable TC•Eighty suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel provides shock absorption for a smooth ride. Special design rooted in the infamous Twin Cities, Minnesota!
all.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Lectric PWR+™: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
all.PAS Torque Sensor: A unique torque sensor combined with PWR+ technology, or Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+, helps to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this technology, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: 11-28 tooth, 7-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth ProWheel chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z7 steel chain offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.
all.LCD Display: A backlit color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: A charging port on the top of the integrated battery provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress comes standard with a 2amp charger for 4-6 hour charging.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Fixed Handlebar Stem: Designed for lasting comfort and control, the XPress High-Step features a fixed handlebar stem, offering a reliable riding position with minimal maintenance. Its timeless silhouette adds to the classic bike look, perfect for riders who value simplicity and style.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Grips: Soft durometer ergonomic grips are full-length on both sides and easily customizable.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.
all.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 50lbs with the 8lb battery removed.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XPress is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress comes with a lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271.
