geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

all.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Stealth M24 Motor: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Motor Controller: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
all.Semi-Intergated Battery: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†
all.Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.
all.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
all.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
all.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Swit: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.
all.Suspension Front Fork: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.
all.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
all.Easy Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Comfort Curve™ Handlebars: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.
all.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.
all.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
all.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Semi-Intergated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Switch™
features.detail: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Comfort Curve™ Handlebars
features.detail: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Comfort Curve™ Handlebars: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.

all.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Semi-Intergated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Switch™
features.detail: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Comfort Curve™ Handlebars
features.detail: The XPress2 Step-Thru Cruiser features curved handlebars paired with an adjustable stem riser and quick-release lever, allowing riders to easily customize handlebar reach and positioning for a more comfortable, upright riding experience.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Folding Kickstand

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Semi-Intergated Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 27.5” x 2.1” slick tires can handle any commute with ease. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Pick your Pedal Response; XPerience Switch™
features.detail: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

features.name: Suspension Front Fork
features.detail: The XPress2 features a best-in-class SR SunTour XCM 32 suspension fork with up to 80mm of travel, providing shock absorption for a smooth ride.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 46-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 27.5-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Hybrid Sprint™ Handlebars
features.detail: The XPress2 High-Step Commuter features sporty Hybrid Sprint™ handlebars with a fixed stem, creating a more athletic, active riding position for confident handling and responsive control. Designed for riders who prefer a performance-inspired feel, the setup delivers a sleek, streamlined look while maintaining the durability and low-maintenance simplicity of a classic commuter bike.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: The XPress is available in 2 different frame styles; a diamond High-Step and an easy-on Step-Thru.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 60lbs with the 6lb battery removed.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XPress2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XPress2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

geometry.Payload Capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
